item.title: Maximize Alumni Job Events 🎯 • Research attending companies in advance. • Prepare a concise personal pitch. • Network actively—collect business cards. • Follow up with personalized emails. • Utilize university resources for guidance. What steps will you take to ensure a successful job event experience? #networking #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Maximize Alumni Job Events 🎯 • Research attending companies in advance. • Prepare a concise personal pitch. • Network actively—collect business cards. • Follow up with personalized emails. • Utilize university resources for guidance. What steps will you take to ensure a successful job event experience? #networking #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
